---
title: "fMRI PALM Results: Summary and Visualization"
output: html_notebook
---

<!--
Purpose:      Summarize FSL PALM permutation-test output files into single CSV files
              per metric, transpose nodal stats for Connectome Workbench visualization,
              generate scatter plots for Model 9 global metrics (N = 512), and generate
              loneliness × age interaction plots for Model 9.4 significant nodes (N = 390).
              All analyses use the absolute-edge variant.

Inputs:
  - datainfo.csv                    Output of behav_preproc_recode_variables.Rmd;
                                    contains all demographic and loneliness variables
  - merge_abs_network_summary_stat_n*.csv   Per-subject network summary stats (absolute)
  - CortexSubcortex_ColeAnticevic_NetPartition_wSubcorGSR_parcels_LR_LabelKey.txt
                                    CAB-NP atlas label key
  - PALM output files in palm_output/{metric}/ under each palm directory

Outputs:
  Model 9 (N = 512):
    - palm_output/abs_model9_{metric}_summary.csv
    - palm_output/transpose_palm_for_wb/transposed_abs_*.txt
    - palm_output/images/abs_n512_model9_age_soil_modularity_aveshortestpath.tiff
  Model 9.4 (N = 390):
    - palm_output/abs_model9_4_{metric}_summary.csv
  Model 9.4 interaction plots:
    - palm_output/images/mod9_4_c3_clustercoef1_byAge5g_SexMaritalHouse.tiff
    - palm_output/images/mod9_4_c3_clustercoef2_byAge5g_SexMaritalHouse.tiff

Dependencies: tidyverse, gridExtra

Usage:        Update paths in USER CONFIGURATION block; then knit or run chunks sequentially.
-->


# Libraries
```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(gridExtra)
```


# USER CONFIGURATION
```{r config}
# Main behavioral/demographic dataframe
datainfo_file <- "/path/to/output/datainfo.csv"

# Network summary stat file (absolute-edge variant; output of fmri_network_analysis_absedges.py)
net_summary_abs_file <- "/path/to/abs/merge_abs_network_summary_stat_n512.csv"

# CAB-NP atlas label key
# (CortexSubcortex_ColeAnticevic_NetPartition_wSubcorGSR_parcels_LR_LabelKey.txt)
cab_info_file <- "/path/to/atlas/CortexSubcortex_ColeAnticevic_NetPartition_wSubcorGSR_parcels_LR_LabelKey.txt"

# PALM input/output directories — absolute-edge variant
# Model 9 (N = 512): same directory used by run_fmri_stats_palm.slurm
abs_palm_dir  <- "/path/to/HCA_stat/palm_models/abs_model"

# Model 9.4 (N = 390): separate PALM directory for sociodemographic model
abs_palm94_dir <- "/path/to/HCA_stat/palm_models/abs_model94"
```


# Load data
```{r load_data}
datainfo <- read.csv(datainfo_file)

# Network summary stats (global metrics: modularity_CAnet, average_shortest_path_length)
df_net_abs <- read.csv(net_summary_abs_file, header = TRUE)

# CAB-NP atlas label key (parcel INDEX and LABEL for extracting significant nodes)
cab_info <- read.table(cab_info_file, header = TRUE)
```


# Define samples
```{r samples}
# Model 9 (N = 512): all fMRI QC-passing participants with loneliness data;
# excludes HCA7083065 (failed QA)
mod9_data <- datainfo %>%
  filter(!is.na(soil_ts),
         TripleOut_FD05_60Fr == 1,
         RS.fMRI_Count == 4,
         src_subject_id != "HCA7083065")

# Model 9.4 (N = 390): Model 9 subset with complete sociodemographic variables
mod94_data <- mod9_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(sex),
         !is.na(household.2g),
         !is.na(marital.2g))
```


# Model 9 (N = 512): PALM results summary
```{r mod9_palm_summary}
# Summarize PALM output files across all metrics and contrasts into a single CSV per metric.
# Also transpose nodal stat files for Connectome Workbench (wb_command) visualization.
#
# PALM output structure (created by run_fmri_stats_palm.slurm):
#   {palm_dir}/palm_output/{metric}/palm_abs_{metric}_*_c{n}_tstat.csv
# Transpose output (must be created beforehand):
#   {palm_dir}/palm_output/transpose_palm_for_wb/

# Graph metrics to summarize (strength excluded; averaged separately)
graph_list <- c("average_shortest_path", "betweencent", "closecent", "clustercoef",
                "eigencent", "modularity", "normstrength", "partcoef", "pgcent")

# Model 9 T-contrast labels: c1 = loneliness, c2 = age, c3 = loneliness×age, c4 = F-test
con_list <- c("c1", "c2", "c3", "c4")

palm_output_dir <- file.path(abs_palm_dir, "palm_output")

for (gg in seq_along(graph_list)) {
  metric     <- graph_list[gg]
  nodal_dir  <- file.path(palm_output_dir, metric)
  list_files <- list.files(nodal_dir, recursive = TRUE)

  df_list <- vector("list", length(con_list))

  for (tt in seq_along(con_list)) {
    con_name    <- con_list[tt]
    con_present <- grepl(con_name, list_files)
    con_files   <- list_files[which(con_present)]

    for (ff in seq_along(con_files)) {
      read_temp <- read.csv(file.path(nodal_dir, con_files[ff]), header = FALSE)

      if (ff == 1) {
        df_list[[tt]] <- t(read_temp)
      } else {
        df_list[[tt]] <- cbind(df_list[[tt]], t(read_temp))
      }

      # Transpose and write individual stat file for Workbench visualization
      temp_df <- t(read_temp)
      write.table(
        temp_df,
        file      = file.path(palm_output_dir, "transpose_palm_for_wb",
                              paste0("transposed_abs_",
                                     sub(".csv", "", con_files[ff]), ".txt")),
        row.names = FALSE,
        col.names = FALSE
      )
    }

    colnames(df_list[[tt]]) <- c(
      paste0(con_name, "_z"),
      paste0(con_name, "_cfwep"),
      paste0(con_name, "_fwep")
    )

    if (tt == 1) {
      df_combine <- df_list[[tt]]
    } else {
      df_combine <- cbind(df_combine, df_list[[tt]])
    }
  }

  write.csv(
    df_combine,
    file      = file.path(palm_output_dir, paste0("abs_model9_", metric, "_summary.csv")),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
}
```


# Model 9 (N = 512): Scatter plots — modularity and average shortest path
```{r mod9_scatter_plots}
# Four-panel figure:
#   (a) Age vs. modularity       (b) Loneliness vs. modularity
#   (c) Age vs. avg path length  (d) Loneliness vs. avg path length

# Merge subject behavioral data with global network summary stats
mod9_plot <- merge(
  mod9_data[, c("src_subject_id", "age_yrs", "soil_ts")],
  df_net_abs,
  by    = "src_subject_id",
  all.x = TRUE
)

# Modularity vs. Age
p_mod_age <- mod9_plot %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = age_yrs, y = modularity_CAnet)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  labs(y = "CAB-NP Modularity") +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
  ggtitle("(a)")

# Modularity vs. Loneliness
p_mod_soil <- mod9_plot %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_ts, y = modularity_CAnet)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  labs(y = "CAB-NP Modularity") +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
  ggtitle("(b)")

# Average shortest path vs. Age
p_path_age <- mod9_plot %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = age_yrs, y = average_shortest_path_length)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  labs(x = "Age (Yrs)", y = "Average Shortest Path Length") +
  ggtitle("(c)")

# Average shortest path vs. Loneliness
p_path_soil <- mod9_plot %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_ts, y = average_shortest_path_length)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  labs(x = "Loneliness Score", y = "Average Shortest Path Length") +
  ggtitle("(d)")

g_combined <- arrangeGrob(p_mod_age, p_mod_soil, p_path_age, p_path_soil,
                          nrow = 2, ncol = 2)
ggsave(
  file = file.path(abs_palm_dir, "palm_output", "images",
                   "abs_n512_model9_age_soil_modularity_aveshortestpath.tiff"),
  g_combined,
  dpi  = 300
)
```


# Model 9.4 (N = 390): PALM results summary
```{r mod94_palm_summary}
# Summarize PALM output for the sociodemographic model (Model 9.4, N = 390).
# 7 contrasts: c1 = loneliness, c2 = age, c3 = loneliness×age, c4 = sex,
#              c5 = household, c6 = marital, c7 = F-test
# No Workbench transpose (nodal visualization not performed for Model 9.4).

con_list_94 <- c("c1", "c2", "c3", "c4", "c5", "c6", "c7")

palm_output_dir <- file.path(abs_palm94_dir, "palm_output")

for (gg in seq_along(graph_list)) {
  metric     <- graph_list[gg]
  nodal_dir  <- file.path(palm_output_dir, metric)
  list_files <- list.files(nodal_dir, recursive = TRUE)

  df_list <- vector("list", length(con_list_94))

  for (tt in seq_along(con_list_94)) {
    con_name    <- con_list_94[tt]
    con_present <- grepl(con_name, list_files)
    con_files   <- list_files[which(con_present)]

    for (ff in seq_along(con_files)) {
      read_temp <- read.csv(file.path(nodal_dir, con_files[ff]), header = FALSE)

      if (ff == 1) {
        df_list[[tt]] <- t(read_temp)
      } else {
        df_list[[tt]] <- cbind(df_list[[tt]], t(read_temp))
      }
    }

    colnames(df_list[[tt]]) <- c(
      paste0(con_name, "_z"),
      paste0(con_name, "_cfwep"),
      paste0(con_name, "_fwep")
    )

    if (tt == 1) {
      df_combine <- df_list[[tt]]
    } else {
      df_combine <- cbind(df_combine, df_list[[tt]])
    }
  }

  write.csv(
    df_combine,
    file      = file.path(palm_output_dir, paste0("abs_model9_4_", metric, "_summary.csv")),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
}
```


# Model 9.4 (N = 390): Interaction plots — age 5-group
```{r mod94_age5g_setup}
# Prepare mod94_data for interaction plots:
# - Ensure age.bins.3 (5-group age variable) is a correctly ordered factor
# - Set factor labels for sex, marital status, and household status

mod94_result <- mod94_data %>%
  mutate(age.bins.3 = as.factor(age.bins.3),
         age.bins.3 = relevel(age.bins.3, "[36,45]"),
         sex        = factor(sex, labels = c("Female", "Male")))

levels(mod94_result$marital.2g)   # verify: Married, Not Married
levels(mod94_result$household.2g) # verify: 2+person, 1-person

# Load absolute-edge nodal clustering coefficient data for Model 9.4 (N = 390)
# (written by fmri_preproc_compile_nodal_palm.Rmd to abs_palm94_dir)
cluster_df <- read.csv(file.path(abs_palm94_dir, "abs_nodal_clustercoef_n390.csv"),
                       header = FALSE)
```

## Node 1: Default-06_L-Caudate (c3: loneliness × age)
```{r mod94_plots_node1_5g}
# Extract clustering coefficient for Default-06_L-Caudate
sig_cluster1_ind <- cab_info %>%
  filter(LABEL == "Default-06_L-Caudate") %>%
  select(INDEX, LABEL)

sig_cluster1              <- cluster_df %>% select(sig_cluster1_ind$INDEX)
colnames(sig_cluster1)    <- "mod9_4_cluster1_c3_DMN"
mod94_result              <- cbind(mod94_result, sig_cluster1)

# (a) Overall: loneliness × age 5g
mod94plot.cluster1.age <- mod94_result %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_ts, y = mod9_4_cluster1_c3_DMN, color = age.bins.3)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  labs(x = "Loneliness Score", y = "Clustering Coefficient", color = "Age Group") +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
  ggtitle("(a)")

# (b) By sex
mod94plot.cluster1.bysex <- mod94_result %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_ts, y = mod9_4_cluster1_c3_DMN, color = age.bins.3)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  facet_grid(~ sex, scales = "free") +
  labs(x = "Loneliness Score", y = "Clustering Coefficient", color = "Age Group") +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.title.y    = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x    = element_blank()) +
  ggtitle("(b)")

# (c) By marital status
mod94plot.cluster1.bymarital <- mod94_result %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_ts, y = mod9_4_cluster1_c3_DMN, color = age.bins.3)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  facet_wrap(~ marital.2g, scales = "free") +
  labs(x = "Loneliness Score", y = "Clustering Coefficient", color = "Age Group") +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  ggtitle("(c)")

# (d) By household status
mod94plot.cluster1.byhousehold <- mod94_result %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_ts, y = mod9_4_cluster1_c3_DMN, color = age.bins.3)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  facet_wrap(~ household.2g, scales = "free") +
  labs(x = "Loneliness Score", y = "Clustering Coefficient", color = "Age Group") +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.title.y    = element_blank()) +
  ggtitle("(d)")

mod94.cluster1.g <- arrangeGrob(
  mod94plot.cluster1.age, mod94plot.cluster1.bysex,
  mod94plot.cluster1.bymarital, mod94plot.cluster1.byhousehold,
  nrow = 2
)
ggsave(
  file = file.path(abs_palm94_dir, "palm_output", "images",
                   "mod9_4_c3_clustercoef1_byAge5g_SexMaritalHouse.tiff"),
  mod94.cluster1.g,
  dpi  = 300
)
```

## Node 2: Frontoparietal-35_R-Cerebellum (c3: loneliness × age)
```{r mod94_plots_node2_5g}
# Extract clustering coefficient for Frontoparietal-35_R-Cerebellum
sig_cluster2_ind           <- cab_info %>%
  filter(LABEL == "Frontoparietal-35_R-Cerebellum") %>%
  select(INDEX, LABEL)

sig_cluster2               <- cluster_df %>% select(sig_cluster2_ind$INDEX)
colnames(sig_cluster2)     <- "mod9_4_cluster2_c3_FPN"
mod94_result               <- cbind(mod94_result, sig_cluster2)

# (a) Overall: loneliness × age 5g
mod94plot.cluster2.age <- mod94_result %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_ts, y = mod9_4_cluster2_c3_FPN, color = age.bins.3)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  labs(x = "Loneliness Score", y = "Clustering Coefficient", color = "Age Group") +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
  ggtitle("(a)")

# (b) By sex
mod94plot.cluster2.bysex <- mod94_result %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_ts, y = mod9_4_cluster2_c3_FPN, color = age.bins.3)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  facet_grid(~ sex, scales = "free") +
  labs(x = "Loneliness Score", y = "Clustering Coefficient", color = "Age Group") +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.title.y    = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x    = element_blank()) +
  ggtitle("(b)")

# (c) By marital status
mod94plot.cluster2.bymarital <- mod94_result %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_ts, y = mod9_4_cluster2_c3_FPN, color = age.bins.3)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  facet_wrap(~ marital.2g, scales = "free") +
  labs(x = "Loneliness Score", y = "Clustering Coefficient", color = "Age Group") +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  ggtitle("(c)")

# (d) By household status
mod94plot.cluster2.byhousehold <- mod94_result %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_ts, y = mod9_4_cluster2_c3_FPN, color = age.bins.3)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  facet_wrap(~ household.2g, scales = "free") +
  labs(x = "Loneliness Score", y = "Clustering Coefficient", color = "Age Group") +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.title.y    = element_blank()) +
  ggtitle("(d)")

mod94.cluster2.g <- arrangeGrob(
  mod94plot.cluster2.age, mod94plot.cluster2.bysex,
  mod94plot.cluster2.bymarital, mod94plot.cluster2.byhousehold,
  nrow = 2
)
ggsave(
  file = file.path(abs_palm94_dir, "palm_output", "images",
                   "mod9_4_c3_clustercoef2_byAge5g_SexMaritalHouse.tiff"),
  mod94.cluster2.g,
  dpi  = 300
)
```
